posts.angle: better ad tooling still needs cleaner billing and payment control
posts.hook: Ad platforms keep adding smarter tools.
posts.copy:
Ad platforms keep adding smarter tools.

There's a new playbook for partnering with creators on marketing campaigns. Teams move faster when payment setup does not slow subscriptions, ads, or cross-border checkout.

RichXPay supports use case page for funding a virtual card with usdt or usdc for subscriptions, ads and overseas spending.
sourceTitles: There's a new playbook for partnering with creators on marketing campaigns.
3 easy ways to shop for spring with Google
